title: Indulgent Shattering Greek Meat Lasagna
description: A rich, decadent, and romantic Greek dish featuring tender meat, crispy phyllo, and a hint of almond extract.
instructions: Thaw phyllo dough according to package instructions.
In a large skillet, cook the ground lamb over medium-high heat until browned, breaking it up with a spoon as it cooks.
Add the sliced olives, diced cucumber, and diced red onion to the skillet and cook until the vegetables are tender.
Stir in the crumbled feta cheese and cook until melted.
In a separate bowl, mix together the melted butter and almond extract.
To assemble the lasagna, place a layer of phyllo dough on the bottom of a 9x13-inch baking dish.
Spread half of the meat mixture over the phyllo layer, followed by half of the butter mixture.
Repeat the layers, starting with the phyllo dough, then the meat mixture, and finally the butter mixture.
Top the lasagna with the chopped parsley and bake for 35-40 minutes, or until the phyllo is golden brown and the filling is hot and bubbly.
Let the lasagna rest for 10-15 minutes before slicing and serving.
